name: xbox-360-companion-electron
description: Full Electron UI for configuring, monitoring, and managing Xbox 360 Companion

scripts.test:electron-security: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node tests/electron/security-smoke.cjs && node tests/electron/badavatar-preview-smoke.cjs
scripts.start: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && electron .
scripts.build:win: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node scripts/sync-assets-icon.js && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win nsis && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:nsis: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win nsis && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:nsis:x64: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win nsis --x64 && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:portable: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node scripts/build-portable.js && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:wl: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win nsis --linux AppImage && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:mac: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac dmg && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:mac:arm: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac dmg --arm64 && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:mac:dmg:arm64: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac dmg --arm64 && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:mac:dmg:x64: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --mac dmg --x64 && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:linux: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --linux AppImage --x64 --arm64 && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --linux AppImage --x64 && npm run clean:compiled-js
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run renderer:build && npm run tsc && node --disable-warning=DEP0190 ./node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --linux AppImage --arm64 && npm run clean:compiled-js

author: Nesquin and ghosty99
